name: Sprout the Sage
description: Adds +$2 to every correct answer. A tiny helper with big wisdom.

name: Buzz the Bee
description: +25% bonus on correct answers. Pollinates your profits!

name: Sunny the Sun
description: Boosts passive income from all planted foods by +50%.

name: Moo the Cow
description: Adds +$10 to every correct answer. She chews and thinks deeply.

name: Drizzle the Cloud
description: Adds +3 seconds to the game timer on every correct answer.

name: Hoot the Owl
description: DOUBLES all question rewards. Hoot hoot, smart choice!

name: Wiggles the Worm
description: +100% passive income — worms enrich the soil and your wallet.

name: Flutter the Butterfly
description: +100% bonus on correct answers. Beautiful and lucrative.

name: Gaia the Dragon
description: Rewards ×3! Legendary eco-guardian who breathes fresh air.
